sections.paragraph:
Original: נחילה

Transliteration: nechı̂ylâh

Phonetic: nekh-ee-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. meaning uncertain
    1. may be name of melody
    2. may be a musical instrument
    3. found only in title of Psa 5:1-12

Origin: probably denominative from H2485

TWOT entry: 1342b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
